name: Fairy Card Rogue
short_description: A single-player deck-building roguelite. Lily White picks her favorite cards... and charges in to raid the card market?! No two runs will ever be the same. Keep trying over and over again, until you finally reach the card master!
detailed_description:
*This game is a Touhou Project fangame.

A roguelite where the dungeon changes
and requires different strategies every time.
Discern which of the many varied cards to use,
and aim to reach the end of the dungeon!

Nailing a combo for some real satisfaction!
Explore a huge card pool to find cards
well-suited to your personal adventure.

Not experienced with roguelites? No problem!
You can enter the dungeon with advantages
by utilizing new features unlocked as you play!

Aim for the top of the online rankings!
Score challenges are are held with unique rules.
Maybe you'll need to play differently than usual?
